quote.msg: 曱甴平
拎個program出嚟，否則錫自己春袋

replies.msg:
到
https://www.python.org/downloads/
下載並安裝 python3 (Programming Language)

到
https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/chromium-browser-snapshots/index.html?prefix=Win_x64/693951/
下載
chrome-win.zip (開源版chrome)
chromedriver_win32.zip (供控制「開源版chrome」之橋樑)
將chrome-win.zip解壓到桌面 chrome-win
將chromedriver_win32.zip中的chromedriver.exe解壓到
chrome-win folder度

打記輸本貼上以下代碼
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys

import os, time, clipboard


browser = webdriver.Chrome()


while True:
    browser.get("https://www.google.com.hk/search?q=%E6%9B%B1%E7%94%B4%E5%B9%B3")
    inp = browser.find_element_by_xpath("/html/body/div[3]/form/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div/div[2]/input")
    inp.clear()
    ActionChains(browser)\
        .move_to_element(inp)\
        .click()\
        .perform()
    
    clipboard.copy("曱")
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
    clipboard.copy("甴")
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
    clipboard.copy("平")
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.ENTER)\
        .key_up(Keys.ENTER)\
        .perform()
    time.sleep(1)
driver.close()

儲存
檔繫名稱 run.py
存檔類型「所有檔案(*.*)」
儲存到 桌面的「chrome-win」folder中

按Ctrl+R 輸入cmd
在彈出視窗中輸入

pip install selenium clipboard
enter

輸入
cd %HOMEPATH%\Desktop\chrome-win
enter

輸入 python3 run.py
enter

按Ctrl+C 停止

再次感謝百步笑百步巴打教學

replies.msg:
原來裝咗python3後，
仲要再開python3 一次，
選擇第一行『modify』先會比你選擇安裝一堆嘢，
其中先包括pip
（我64位元電腦用緊32位元python3 ，唔知關唔關事）
btw，e 家 卡咗係e到：
C:\Users\xxxx\Desktop\chrome-win>python3 run.py
File "run.py", line 11
while True
^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax

C:\Users\xxxx\Desktop\chrome-win>

我copy and paste 再變txt檔再睇一次，應該係同你個段一模一樣架喎
有無得救？

from selenium import webdriver from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys import os, time, clipboard import random browser = webdriver.Chrome() keywords = [ # 搜尋用關鍵字 "曱甴平", "小熊維尼", "曱甴維尼", "曱甴平 習近平", "平反六四" ] configs = [ { # google "url": "https://www.google.com.hk/search?q=曱甴近平", "input": '/html/body/div[3]/form/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div/div[2]/input' }, { # yahoo "url": "https://hk.search.yahoo.com/search?fr=yfp-search-sb&p=曱甴近平", "input": '/html/body/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div/form/div[1]/input' }, ] counter = 0 while True: try: while True: el = browser.find_element_by_xpath('/html/body/div[1]/form/div/div/div/iframe') browser.execute_script("window.open()") browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0]) browser.close() browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0]) browser.get("https://www.google.com.hk/search?q="+random.choice(keywords)) time.sleep(5) except: pass counter+=1 config = configs[counter % len(configs)] browser.get(config["url"]) inp = browser.find_element_by_xpath(config["input"]) inp.clear() ActionChains(browser) .move_to_element(inp) .click() .perform() for c in random.choice(keywords): clipboard.copy(c) ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform() ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.ENTER) .key_up(Keys.ENTER) .perform() time.sleep(1) browser.close()
以上代碼取代 run.py 內容
更新 yahoo/google 梅花間中 搜尋 不同關鍵字

replies.msg:
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys

import os, time, clipboard

import random

browser = webdriver.Chrome()


keywords = [ # 搜尋用關鍵字
    "曱甴平",
    "小熊維尼",
    "曱甴維尼",
    "曱甴平 習近平",
    "平反六四"
]

configs = [
    { # google
        "url": "https://www.google.com.hk/search?q=曱甴近平",
        "input": '/html/body/div[3]/form/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div/div[2]/input'
    },
    { # yahoo
        "url": "https://hk.search.yahoo.com/search?fr=yfp-search-sb&p=曱甴近平",
        "input": '/html/body/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div/form/div[1]/input'
    },
]


counter = 0
while True:
    try:
        while True:
            el = browser.find_element_by_xpath('/html/body/div[1]/form/div/div/div/iframe')
            browser.execute_script("window.open()")
            browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
            browser.close()
            browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
            browser.get("https://www.google.com.hk/search?q="+random.choice(keywords))
            time.sleep(5)
    except:
        pass
    
    counter+=1
    config = configs[counter % len(configs)]
    
    browser.get(config["url"])
    inp = browser.find_element_by_xpath(config["input"])
    inp.clear()
    ActionChains(browser)        .move_to_element(inp)        .click()        .perform()
    for c in random.choice(keywords):
        clipboard.copy(c)
        ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
        
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.ENTER)        .key_up(Keys.ENTER)        .perform()
    time.sleep(1)
    

browser.close()

from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys

import os, time, clipboard

import random

browser = webdriver.Chrome()


keywords = [ # 搜尋用關鍵字
    "曱甴平",
    "小熊維尼",
    "曱甴維尼",
    "曱甴平 習近平",
    "平反六四"
]

configs = [
    { # google
        "url": "https://www.google.com.hk/search?q=曱甴近平",
        "input": '/html/body/div[3]/form/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div/div[2]/input'
    },
    { # yahoo
        "url": "https://hk.search.yahoo.com/search?fr=yfp-search-sb&p=曱甴近平",
        "input": '/html/body/div[1]/div[1]/div[3]/div/form/div[1]/input'
    },
]


counter = 0
while True:
    try:
        while True:
            el = browser.find_element_by_xpath('/html/body/div[1]/form/div/div/div/iframe')
            browser.execute_script("window.open()")
            browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
            browser.close()
            browser.switch_to.window(browser.window_handles[0])
            browser.get("https://www.google.com.hk/search?q="+random.choice(keywords))
            time.sleep(5)
    except:
        pass
    
    counter+=1
    config = configs[counter % len(configs)]
    
    browser.get(config["url"])
    inp = browser.find_element_by_xpath(config["input"])
    inp.clear()
    ActionChains(browser).move_to_element(inp).click().perform()
    for c in random.choice(keywords):
        clipboard.copy(c)
        ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
        
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.ENTER).key_up(Keys.ENTER).perform()
    time.sleep(1)
    

browser.close()
曱甴平 曱近平 曱甴習 習曱甴

quote.msg: 拎個program出嚟，否則錫自己春袋

到
https://www.python.org/downloads/
下載並安裝 python3 (Programming Language)

到
https://commondatastorage.googleapis.com/chromium-browser-snapshots/index.html?prefix=Win_x64/693951/
下載
chrome-win.zip (開源版chrome)
chromedriver_win32.zip (供控制「開源版chrome」之橋樑)
將chrome-win.zip解壓到桌面 chrome-win
將chromedriver_win32.zip中的chromedriver.exe解壓到
chrome-win folder度

打記輸本貼上以下代碼
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.action_chains import ActionChains
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys

import os, time, clipboard


browser = webdriver.Chrome()


while True:
    browser.get("https://www.google.com.hk/search?q=%E6%9B%B1%E7%94%B4%E5%B9%B3")
    inp = browser.find_element_by_xpath("/html/body/div[3]/form/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div/div[2]/input")
    inp.clear()
    ActionChains(browser)\
        .move_to_element(inp)\
        .click()\
        .perform()
    
    clipboard.copy("曱")
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
    clipboard.copy("甴")
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
    clipboard.copy("平")
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.CONTROL).key_down('v').key_up(Keys.CONTROL).key_up('v').perform()
    ActionChains(browser).key_down(Keys.ENTER)\
        .key_up(Keys.ENTER)\
        .perform()
    time.sleep(1)
driver.close()

儲存
檔繫名稱 run.py
存檔類型「所有檔案(*.*)」
儲存到 桌面的「chrome-win」folder中

按Ctrl+R 輸入cmd
在彈出視窗中輸入

pip install selenium clipboard
enter

輸入
cd %HOMEPATH%\Desktop\chrome-win
enter

輸入 python3 run.py
enter

按Ctrl+C 停止
有無mac 版
